scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch {} }); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || process.env.npm_execpath || ''; if (!/\bpnpm\b/.test(ua)) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
